changeLog:
0.9.7:
• Motion & orientation sensors — DeviceOrientation (now full 3-axis incl. a tilt-compensated compass heading) and DeviceMotion fire with real accelerometer + gyroscope data from the TouchPad's sensors.
• Generic Sensor API — Accelerometer, Gyroscope, Magnetometer and LinearAccelerationSensor, backed by the same live sensor data (html5test Sensors 5/5).

0.9.6:
• AVIF and JPEG-XL image decoding — next-gen image formats now display (via dav1d / libjxl).
• Faster first-page load — engine binary stripped 104→67 MB, so a cold start has far less to fault in; once warm, subsequent pages/reloads fly.
• Persistent media plugin registry — no GStreamer rescan lag on the first browse after each reboot.
• MIME handler cleanup — Atlas opens image / audio / video and file/ftp links, but no longer competes for the default-browser or plain-text role.
• TLS: upgraded the network crypto stack to OpenSSL 3.5 LTS (from 3.0) — HTTPS and WebRTC (DTLS) verified.

0.9.5:
• New web APIs: Payment Request, Gamepad, Web App Manifest, Web Speech synthesis (4 Flite voices), form date/time/color pickers, Encrypted Media (ClearKey).
• WOFF2 web fonts — modern sites render their fonts instead of blank text.
• Images: JPEG + WebP canvas export (toDataURL).
• Media: AAC, Ogg/Vorbis/Opus, WMA/WMV, Ogg Theora, MPEG-TS; autoplay-with-sound toggle.
• WebRTC: peer connections, data channels, and receive-path audio + video; camera getUserMedia.
• Scrolling: tall / JavaScript-grown pages now scroll all the way; fixed fast-flick stripe artifacts and portrait-rotation shear.
• Fixes: type in the address bar after a page auto-focuses an input; memory-pressure valve (no more heavy-page reboots); WebProcess leak on card close; storage/cache moved off VFAT (IndexedDB); injected-bundle deploy consistency.
• App: password + autofill managers, start-page grid, text-selection toolbar, cross-app paste, translate option, App Museum II auto-update.
• Self-contained IPK bundling the full current engine. html5test.co ~449 → ~535.
title: Atlas Web
